message:
refactor: remove all Klaude/KKC references, rebrand to KubeStellar Console (#163)

BREAKING CHANGE: This renames MCP plugins, env vars, localStorage keys,
the agent binary, and the Helm chart.

Renames:
- KubeStellar Klaude Console → KubeStellar Console
- kkc-agent → ksc-agent (KubeStellar Console agent)
- klaude-ops → kubestellar-ops (MCP plugin)
- klaude-deploy → kubestellar-deploy (MCP plugin)
- KLAUDE_OPS_PATH → KUBESTELLAR_OPS_PATH
- KLAUDE_DEPLOY_PATH → KUBESTELLAR_DEPLOY_PATH
- KKC_ALLOWED_ORIGINS → KSC_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
- KKC_AGENT_TOKEN → KSC_AGENT_TOKEN
- ~/.kkc/ → ~/.ksc/ (agent config directory)
- All klaude_* localStorage keys → ksc_*
- All kkc-* localStorage keys → ksc-*
- KlaudeIcon.tsx → ConsoleAIIcon.tsx
- KlaudeMissions.tsx → ConsoleMissions.tsx
- "Klaude AI" references → "AI" throughout UI
- Helm chart: kubestellar-klaude-console → kubestellar-console

97 files changed across Go backend, React frontend, CI/CD workflows,
Helm charts, scripts, tests, and documentation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
